title: Boys Quiz — multi-choice friend trivia, May 2025
html:
TL;DR

  • A multiple-choice trivia quiz Yahir wrote about himself + his core friend group, almost certainly for the Chelympics weekend Kahoot round.
  • Sample questions:
    • "How many times has Owen been to the hospital in college: 3, 1, 2, 4" — Owen's accident rate is itself trivia.
    • "What is Kyle's full name?" — joke options: Kyle Phoung Binh Nguyen, Kyle Than Re Nguyen, Kyle Yung Man Nguyen, Kyle Pho Gud Nguyen.
    • "What is YG's dog name?" — Neron, Skipper, Duclues, Alph.
    • "How much did YG lose at the casino today?" — $150, $500, $200, $300.
    • "YG's favorite food?" — teriyaki chicken, steak, shawarma, pussy.
    • "Who has the triple-double lead?" — Andrew, Huck, YG, Luke.
    • "What is YG's zodiac sign?" — Gemini, Libra, Sagittarius (correct), Leo.
    • "What is Ayden's original Nickname?" — Quantillius Finglenut, Octavius Glimmerfist, Blubber Claw, BubbaChuck (likely correct given his cousin's "Bubba" thread).
    • "How many kids does YG want?" — None, 2, 4, 5.

Pattern observed

Trivia format reveals friend-group lore — Owen's hospital count, Kyle Nguyen's full-name jokes, Ayden's BubbaChuck origin nickname, YG's gambling losses.

Why it matters in the graph

  • Companion to 2025 05 09 initiation to chelympics — both notes from same event-weekend.
  • Provides enumerable facts for friend entities: Owen (hospital trips count), Kyle (full-name joke options), Ayden (BubbaChuck nickname).
  • Confirms YG sagittarius, dog name probably Lola (per 2022 07 31 vietnam route prep "wash Lola"), kids-want number open (2, 4, or 5).
  • The casino-loss-amount question is a direct continuation of the peer betting culture — losing money for sport is enough of a normalized friend-group activity that it becomes trivia.

Open questions

  • Was the quiz actually played at the May 2025 weekend? Scored?
  • Confirm YG's dog name — Lola (per other notes) is not on the list?

Wikilinks
